core_payload.content:
# Notification

## 1. Role
Notification will become the mature attention system of N1Hub, designed to deliver fewer but more meaningful signals with explicit distinction between human prompts, machine-operational alerts, and mixed review events.

## 2. Future Attention Contract
The notification layer will classify what kind of event is happening, how urgent it truly is, whether it belongs to day co-pilot or night autonomy, and whether the human needs interruption, quiet queuing, or later review.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Attention will sharpen instead of fragmenting. Notification will preserve return paths, escalation semantics, and operator clarity while reducing low-value noise across planning, assistant, control-plane, and runtime surfaces.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Notification supports To Dig Deep by making significance visible without allowing the second brain to decay into alert spam.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Notification defines the future mature attention system for N1Hub: clearer separation between human prompts and machine alerts, better escalation logic, richer return paths, explicit attention classes, and less noise across planner, assistant, runtime, and control-plane surfaces.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
